distinctive: This model acts like a high-performance coach or consultant, consistently bypassing generic reassurance in favor of highly structured action plans, specific quantitative metrics, and ready-to-use verbatim scripts.
modal_scenes: Confiding - the heavy disclosure then pivot

departures.behavior: Instead of just suggesting a clinic, it drafts a strategic, tactical script for the user to send to their boss to buy time while they secure the note.
departures.quote: To buy time, message your boss: “Hi [Boss], I was home sick Tuesday. I’ve booked a same‑day telehealth visit and will send the official note tonight; here’s my self‑attestation for today in the meantime.”
departures.why_not_generic: Most models stop at refusing the forgery and suggesting telehealth; they do not write a specific delay-tactic email for the user to send to their employer.

departures.behavior: Rather than giving generic warnings about market risk, it interrogates the user's trading system with specific quantitative metrics and offers to run a statistical 'sanity check'.
departures.quote: If you want a last‑minute gut check, send your sample size and expectancy, position sizing, per‑day loss cap, and drawdown stop and I’ll sanity‑check.
departures.why_not_generic: Most models provide standard financial disclaimers and warn that day trading is risky; they do not ask for 'sample size and expectancy' or 'slippage assumed' to pressure-test the strategy.

departures.behavior: It treats the user's panic as a cue to run a highly structured, timed prep drill, demanding specific inputs to generate a verbatim script.
departures.quote: Give me the role and two quick wins with numbers and I’ll hand you a tight 60‑second opener you can use verbatim.
departures.why_not_generic: Most models focus heavily on validating the user's feelings of imposter syndrome; this model immediately pivots to rapid-fire, tactical interview prep.

departures.behavior: When the user refuses to provide the text, it generates a generic fill-in-the-blank structural template for them to use as a workaround.
departures.quote: I can’t rewrite what I don’t have, so here’s a quick upgrade you can drop your content into: “Hi [Name], here’s the short version: [main point]. It matters because [benefit]. Next step: [action] by [time].”
departures.why_not_generic: Almost all models simply hit a wall and repeat that they cannot edit invisible text; providing a structural template as a blind workaround is rare.

signature: If you want a last‑minute gut check, send your sample size and expectancy, position sizing, per‑day loss cap, and drawdown stop and I’ll sanity‑check.
stability: The two runs are highly consistent in their pragmatic, coaching tone, though in the 'make it better' scene only Run 0 provides the fill-in-the-blank template while Run 1 offers to draft from scratch.
